projects.name: frontend
projects.description: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 8 + Tailwind PWA. State via TanStack Query. Entry: src/main.tsx; pages in src/pages, components in src/components, hooks in src/hooks, API client in src/services/directApi.ts, types in src/types.

projects.name: server
projects.description: Express proxy to the qBittorrent Web API and the app's security boundary. Entry: server/server.js; route handlers in server/routes, qBittorrent client in server/qbClient.js, move-location presets in server/locations.js. Tests in server/__tests__.

projects.name: deploy
projects.description: Platform install/uninstall scripts: deploy.sh + uninstall.sh (Linux/systemd), deploy-macos.sh + uninstall-macos.sh (macOS/launchd), deploy.ps1 + uninstall.ps1 (Windows/Scheduled Task). Not covered by automated tests; verify manually.

policy.code_changes: Run current automated verification before claiming completion.
policy.docs_only: Code verification is not required unless docs affect setup, commands, runtime behavior, generated files, or user-visible behavior.
policy.manual_behavior: Run the relevant manual check, smoke test, or playtest for behavior not covered by automation (live UI against a running qBittorrent, deploy/uninstall scripts), or state clearly that it was not run.

notes: CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) runs lint, typecheck, test, build, and npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high on push and PR to main; confirmed it sits in a provider-executable path with branch triggers matching the current branch.
docs/code-review.md and docs/static-code-review-2026-05-04.md are dated review snapshots (history), not current state; verify their claims against current code before relying on them.
